body:
This PR starts the implementation of the conversion between frames described in #3625

cc @glwagner @siddharthabishnu
title: Conversion between "Intrinsic" and "Extrinsic" reference frame

body:
this PR improves the API for `TracerAdvection` by

- exporting it
- allowing `nothing` advection within a `TracerAdvection` type
title: Improvements for `TracerAdvection`'s API
